title: Business Gift Cards

description: How can I prepare a traditional Moroccan lamb tagine, including ingredients, spices, and step‑by‑step cooking instructions?

title: Car Sun Protection

title: Small Vessels

narrative: Relevant material will discuss watercraft that are considered small—such as dinghies, canoes, rowboats, launch boats, or traditional regional boats—covering their design, size, function, cultural context, or photographic representations. Documents that describe the construction, historical usage, or visual examples of such small boats satisfy the need. Exclude content about medical or biological vessels, large commercial ships, or unrelated uses of the word "vessel" (e.g., acupuncture meridians).
